title: hebe dorrien-smithii
intro: Hebe dorrien-smithii, also known as the Hebe, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Hebe dorrien-smithii is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Hebe dorrien-smithii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
